subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Me, the All-Knowing, the All-Informed. I bear witness that He is God, there is none other God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا انا العلیم الخبیر اشهد انه هو الله لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @nearness and remoteness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @high station of the true believer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
